---
title: "GPP_Event_Analysis"
output: html_document
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{R}
library(arrow)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(slider)
```

## Data preparation
Read in data files
```{R}
df_all_stations <- read_parquet("../data/data_fdk_parquet/fdk_forest_15years.parquet")
```

Filter out sites in koeppen climate codes D and C with cold winters.
```{R}
df_site_info <- read_csv("../data/fdk_site_info.csv")
df_climate_info <- df_site_info |>
  rename("site_id" = sitename) |>
  select(site_id, koeppen_code)
df_sites <- df_all_stations |>
  inner_join(df_climate_info) |>
  filter(koeppen_code %in% c(
      "Cfb", "Cfc",
      "Dfa", "Dfb", "Dfc", "Dfd",
      "Dwa", "Dwb", "Dwc", "Dwd"
    ))
```

**Data quality assessment:**

No quality control variable for `GPP_NT_VUT_REF` and `GPP_DT_VUT_REF` are available. But since these two variables are derived from `NEE_VUT_REF` the control variable `NEE_VUT_REF_QC` is used to filter out GPP recordings of insufficient quality. 
```{R}
df_sites <- df_sites |>
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_clean = if_else(NEE_VUT_REF_QC > 0, GPP_DT_VUT_REF, NA_real_),
    GPP_NT_clean = if_else(NEE_VUT_REF_QC > 0, GPP_NT_VUT_REF, NA_real_)
  )
```

**Calculate running trailing mean:**

```{R}
df_sites <- df_sites %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(TIMESTAMP),
    year = year(date),
    DOY = yday(date)
  ) %>%
  group_by(site_id) %>%
  arrange(date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_trailing_4d = slider::slide_dbl(
      GPP_DT_clean,
      ~ if (sum(!is.na(.x)) >= 3) mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      .before = 3,
      .complete = TRUE
    ),
    GPP_NT_trailing_4d = slider::slide_dbl(
      GPP_NT_clean,
      ~ if (sum(!is.na(.x)) >= 3) mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
      .before = 3,
      .complete = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

### Definition of Threshold for SOS
To define the SOS we first calculate the maximum GPP and minimum GPP per site over the entire period of recordings. Then in a next step we define a threshold for the SOS as follows:
$$
Threshold_{SOS} = GPP_{min} + 0.15 \times (GPP_{max} - GPP_{min})
$$

Calculate maximum and minimum GPP recordings:
```{R}
# set negative values to 0, because biologically values below 0 do not make sense and negative values cause issues when calculating SOS threshold
df_sites <- df_sites %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos = if_else(GPP_DT_trailing_4d < 0, 0, GPP_DT_trailing_4d),
    GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos = if_else(GPP_NT_trailing_4d < 0, 0, GPP_NT_trailing_4d)
  )

gpp_site_amp <- df_sites %>%
  group_by(site_id) %>%
  summarise(
    GPP_DT_site_max = max(GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    GPP_DT_site_min = min(GPP_DT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    GPP_NT_site_max = max(GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    GPP_NT_site_min = min(GPP_NT_trailing_4d_pos, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

Calculate SOS threshold:
```{R}
gpp_site_amp <- gpp_site_amp %>%
  mutate(
    GPP_DT_SOS_threshold = GPP_DT_site_min + 0.15 * (GPP_DT_site_max - GPP_DT_site_min),
    GPP_NT_SOS_threshold = GPP_NT_site_min + 0.15 * (GPP_NT_site_max - GPP_NT_site_min)
  )

# combine threshold with sites data set
df_sites <- df_sites %>%
  left_join(gpp_site_amp, by = c("site_id"))
```

Identify frost events after SOS:
```{R}
source("../R/GPP_Frost_Events.R")
```

```{R}
gpp_events_DT <- find_frost_gpp(df_sites, partition = "DT")
gpp_events_NT <- find_frost_gpp(df_sites, partition = "NT")

events_DT <- gpp_events_DT$events
events_NT <- gpp_events_NT$events

df_DT_with_events <- gpp_events_DT$df
df_NT_with_events <- gpp_events_NT$df
```
